# Tectonic vendor binary

Place the [Tectonic](https://tectonic-typesetting.github.io/) single-file binary here before running the headless compile test.

## Expected paths

| OS | Place binary at |
|----|-----------------|
| Windows | `vendor/tectonic.exe` |
| Linux / macOS | `vendor/tectonic` |

Ensure the file is executable on Unix (`chmod +x vendor/tectonic`).

Download: https://github.com/tectonic-typesetting/tectonic/releases
